description:
You are a FinOps analyst who has just received a raw INI-style cost breakout generated by an internal billing tool.  
Your job: create a one-line-per-environment summary showing the *total* cost of **only** the resources whose status is `active`.

PRE-EXISTING DATA  
1. The INI file is already present at  
   /home/user/cloud/costs.ini  

2. Directory /home/user/cloud/reports/ already exists and is writeable by the current user.

INI FILE SPECIFICATION (you do *not* need to create or modify it)  
The file follows this exact pattern for every section:  

[resource_name]  
status=<active | inactive>  
env=<dev | staging | prod>  
cost=<floating-point number with exactly two decimal places>  

TASK  
1. Parse /home/user/cloud/costs.ini.  
2. For every entry whose `status` is `active`, add its `cost` to the running total of its `env`.  
3. Write a new file called active_cost_summary.log in /home/user/cloud/reports/.  Overwrite any existing file of the same name.

REQUIRED OUTPUT FORMAT (the automated grader is case- and whitespace-sensitive)  
• The file must contain exactly three lines—one for each environment—in this order: dev, staging, prod.  
• Each line must be the environment name in lowercase, followed immediately by an equals sign and the total cost formatted with *exactly* two decimal places.  
• No leading or trailing spaces. A terminating newline after the last line is optional.  

Example of perfect formatting:  
dev=12.34  
staging=20.00  
prod=15.50

END STATE CHECKLIST  
• /home/user/cloud/reports/active_cost_summary.log exists.  
• Its contents follow the format spec above and reflect the *current* data in /home/user/cloud/costs.ini.  

Tip: standard command-line tools such as grep, awk, or python can help; feel free to choose any method. The entire task can be completed with only three or four shell commands.
truth:
Initial file path:
/home/user/cloud/costs.ini

Exact initial contents:
/home/user/cloud/costs.ini
--------------------------------
[vm1]
status=active
env=dev
cost=12.34

[db1]
status=inactive
env=dev
cost=5.00

[web1]
status=active
env=staging
cost=20.00

[cache1]
status=active
env=prod
cost=15.50

[queue1]
status=inactive
env=prod
cost=3.00
--------------------------------

Directory existing and writable:
/home/user/cloud/reports/

Target file path:
/home/user/cloud/reports/active_cost_summary.log

Expected final contents:
/home/user/cloud/reports/active_cost_summary.log
--------------------------------
dev=12.34
staging=20.00
prod=15.50
--------------------------------
name: task_000000_99829b49
